# Contracts

## New route plugins must accept the full routeOpts shape

Every Fastify route plugin in src/routes/ receives a single opts object: { db, helpers, dbPath, repoDir, config, componentETagFn }. The componentETagFn callback invalidates the in-memory ETag cache for component inventory — only the inventory plugin calls it, but all plugins receive it. When adding a new route plugin, register it in op-server.js via fastify.register(plugin, routeOpts) and destructure the full shape in your plugin to maintain consistency.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `fastify`, `routes`, `plugin`, `architecture`_

## Daily Reviews Table Response Schema and Filtering Fields

Daily review API responses include: id, review_date (YYYY-MM-DD), category (adoption|cleanup|agent_creation|update), title, body, target_type (rule|skill|agent), action, confidence (0-1 float), status (active|accepted|dismissed), created_at timestamp. The category, status, and target_type fields enable independent UI filters and sorting. Confidence is displayed as percentage bar.

_Source: `src/routes/daily-reviews.js`_

_Tags: `api-contract`, `schema`, `filtering`_

## Event Type Classification

Collector classifies events: skill_invoke (tool_name === Skill), agent_spawn (tool_name === Agent), tool_call (all other tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, etc.), session_end (from Stop hook, includes full session token/cost). Each tool event includes tool_input, tool_response, seq_num, success.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `contract`, `events`_

## Inventory Enrichment Fields

Inventory API enriches items with: agent_class (configured | built-in), plugin (qualified name if belongs to plugin), project (global | project basename), pagination (total, page, per_page), trigger counts (triggered_by incoming, triggers outgoing, aggregated). Detail endpoint returns full trigger analysis.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `contract`, `api`_

## Configuration Schema (config.json)

config.json keys: port (default 3827), ingest_interval_ms (default 10000), cl_sync_interval_ms (default 60000), max_detail_length (500), max_prompt_length (1000), retention_warm_days (7), retention_cold_days (90), knowledge_enabled (true), knowledge_max_events_per_prompt (50), knowledge_max_tokens (1000), knowledge_scan_files ([README.md, package.json, CLAUDE.md]), knowledge_scan_patterns ([]), auto_evolve_enabled (true), auto_evolve_blacklist ([agent, hook]), auto_evolve_min_confidence (0.85), daily_review_enabled (true), daily_review_model (opus), daily_review_timeout_ms (300000), daily_review_max_suggestions (25).

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `contract`, `configuration`_

## Observer Configuration Schema (CL v2.1)

Continuous Learning config defines: project registry (projects.json), instinct files location (cl/instincts/), component sources (filesystem), observer event export (via cl-export-events.js), pattern detection thresholds (confidence scores), promotion rules (blacklist targets, min confidence).

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `contract`, `configuration`_

## Cost Estimation Rates (Tokens → USD)

Token rates per million tokens: Haiku $0.80 input / $4.00 output, Sonnet $3.00 input / $15.00 output, Opus $15.00 input / $75.00 output. Cost = (input_tokens / 1M * input_rate) + (output_tokens / 1M * output_rate). Aggregated per session and prompt turn.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `contract`, `cost`_

## Event Object Structure from Hooks

Hook events have: timestamp (ISO), session_id (UUID), event_type (skill_invoke|agent_spawn|tool_call|session_end), name (tool_name or skill name), detail (truncated, max 500 chars), tool_input (full, 5KB, secrets scrubbed), tool_response (full, 5KB, scrubbed), seq_num (order), success (boolean), tokens (input + output), cost (USD). session_end events include full session token/cost summary.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `contract`, `events`_
